name: Gooey Butter Cake
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
TOPPING
---------
1. In a large bowl, combine powdered sugar and eggs until well mixed.
2. Add cream cheese to the mixture and beat until very light.
3. Pour the topping evenly over the prepared cake batter in a 9x13 inch baking pan.
4. Bake for 45-60 minutes at 350°F (175°C), or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
End of Instructions
